brief.goal: Long-form marketing presentation focused on ROSPAN projects, proof points, product fit and lead generation.
brief.audience: B2B buyers, architects, contractors, public and commercial facility decision makers.
brief.cta: Request samples, price list or project calculation.
brief.style: Corporate technical, source-backed, calm pacing, visual proof from site screenshots and project pages.

sourceCrawl.note: One /firesafety/ng/ crawl hit ConnectionResetError; other 48 indexed pages were captured.

exportProfiles.label: DEMO
exportProfiles.description: Client preview with a large DEMO watermark, normal audio and burned-in captions.

exportProfiles.label: FINAL
exportProfiles.description: Clean final export after approval: no watermark, normal audio, captions off.

exportProfiles.label: NO SOUND
exportProfiles.description: Video with audio muted, burned-in captions enabled and text delivered as separate sidecar files.

exportProfiles.label: SUBS ON
exportProfiles.description: Clean video export with burned-in captions enabled.

exportProfiles.label: AUDIO DEMO
exportProfiles.description: Audio-only client review profile for the mixed voiceover and background music track.

exportProfiles.label: AUDIO FINAL
exportProfiles.description: Approved final audio master profile for the mixed soundtrack.
